printed.name: Balance Control Front
printed.setup: Standing on carriage facing risers, hands placed on shoulder rests, shoulders over wrists, place one foot on footbar, plantarflexed, straighten leg, place other foot on footbar, plantarflexed, straighten leg into Front Support position (page 38 Mat MAWB)

movement.inhale: Extend shoulders, moving carriage in towards stopper, return to start position

cues: Keep range of motion of shoulder flexion within range of scapular and trunk control
Minimize changes of body height during shoulder flexion
